---
title: "Simple Dashboard"
author: "Fotis Sioutas"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    vertical_layout: fill

params:
  magpie_data: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(magclass)
library(mip)
library(quitte)

configFile <- system.file(package = "postprom", file.path("extdata", "validationConfig_OPEN-PROM.csv"))
piam <- read.csv(configFile, sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
regionspiam <- unique(piam$region)

data <- params$magpie_data
names(dimnames(data))[3] <- "variable.unit"
#keep only regions in PIAM config
data <- data[intersect(getRegions(data), strsplit(regionspiam[2], ",")[[1]]),,]
ncol <- ceiling(length(strsplit(regionspiam[2], ",")[[1]]) / 4)
```

# Emissions CO2 {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-stats"}

```{r Emissions CO2 plot}
vars <- c(
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Demand.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Supply.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Industrial Processes.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|AFOLU.Mt CO2/yr"
)

CO2emi <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

p <- ggplot(CO2emi, aes(period, value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_area() +
  facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))   # key for compact legend

g <- ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.25,
      font = list(size = 10),
      itemwidth = 30
    ),
    margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 20, b = 110)
  )

# 🔧 Fix domains WITHOUT breaking grid + add spacing
xaxes <- grep("^xaxis", names(g$x$layout), value = TRUE)

gap_inner <- 0.01   # spacing between panels
gap_outer <- 0.003  # spacing at edges (left/right)

for(i in seq_along(xaxes)) {
  col <- (i - 1) %% ncol
  
  start <- col / ncol
  end   <- (col + 1) / ncol
  
  left_gap  <- if(col == 0) gap_outer else gap_inner
  right_gap <- if(col == ncol - 1) gap_outer else gap_inner
  
  g$x$layout[[xaxes[i]]]$domain <- c(start + left_gap, end - right_gap)
}

g
```

---

# Carbon Prices {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-eur"}

```{r Carbon Prices plot}
PrC <- as.quitte(data[, , "Price|Carbon.US$2015/tn CO2"]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

p <- ggplot(PrC, aes(period, value)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))   # key for compact legend

g <- ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.25,
      font = list(size = 10),
      itemwidth = 30
    ),
    margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 20, b = 110)
  )

# 🔧 Fix domains WITHOUT breaking grid + add spacing
xaxes <- grep("^xaxis", names(g$x$layout), value = TRUE)

gap_inner <- 0.01   # spacing between panels
gap_outer <- 0.003  # spacing at edges (left/right)

for(i in seq_along(xaxes)) {
  col <- (i - 1) %% ncol
  
  start <- col / ncol
  end   <- (col + 1) / ncol
  
  left_gap  <- if(col == 0) gap_outer else gap_inner
  right_gap <- if(col == ncol - 1) gap_outer else gap_inner
  
  g$x$layout[[xaxes[i]]]$domain <- c(start + left_gap, end - right_gap)
}

g
```

---

# Secondary Energy Electricity {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Secondary Energy Electricity plot}
vars <- c(
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Biofuels|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Biofuels|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Coal|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Coal|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Gas|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Gas|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Geothermal and other renewable sources.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Heat.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Hydrogen.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Oil.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Hydro.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Wind.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Solar.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Nuclear.TWh"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

# p <- ggplot(elMix, aes(period, value, fill = variable)) +
#   geom_area() +
#   facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#     theme(
#     panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
#     panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines")
#   )
# 
# ggplotly(p) %>%
#   layout(autosize = TRUE)

p <- ggplot(elMix, aes(period, value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_area() +
  facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))   # key for compact legend

g <- ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.25,
      font = list(size = 10),
      itemwidth = 30
    ),
    margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 20, b = 110)
  )

# 🔧 Fix domains WITHOUT breaking grid + add spacing
xaxes <- grep("^xaxis", names(g$x$layout), value = TRUE)

gap_inner <- 0.01   # spacing between panels
gap_outer <- 0.003  # spacing at edges (left/right)

for(i in seq_along(xaxes)) {
  col <- (i - 1) %% ncol
  
  start <- col / ncol
  end   <- (col + 1) / ncol
  
  left_gap  <- if(col == 0) gap_outer else gap_inner
  right_gap <- if(col == ncol - 1) gap_outer else gap_inner
  
  g$x$layout[[xaxes[i]]]$domain <- c(start + left_gap, end - right_gap)
}

g
```
---

# Capacity|Electricity {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Capacity Electricity plot}
vars <- c(
  "Capacity|Electricity|Biofuels|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Biofuels|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Coal|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Coal|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Gas|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Gas|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Geothermal and other renewable sources.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Hydrogen.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Oil.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Hydro.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Wind.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Solar.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Nuclear.GW"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

p <- ggplot(elMix, aes(period, value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_area() +
  facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))   # key for compact legend

g <- ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.25,
      font = list(size = 10),
      itemwidth = 30
    ),
    margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 20, b = 110)
  )

# 🔧 Fix domains WITHOUT breaking grid + add spacing
xaxes <- grep("^xaxis", names(g$x$layout), value = TRUE)

gap_inner <- 0.01   # spacing between panels
gap_outer <- 0.003  # spacing at edges (left/right)

for(i in seq_along(xaxes)) {
  col <- (i - 1) %% ncol
  
  start <- col / ncol
  end   <- (col + 1) / ncol
  
  left_gap  <- if(col == 0) gap_outer else gap_inner
  right_gap <- if(col == ncol - 1) gap_outer else gap_inner
  
  g$x$layout[[xaxes[i]]]$domain <- c(start + left_gap, end - right_gap)
}

g
```
---

# Final Energy {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Final Energy plot}
vars <- c(
  "Final Energy|Industry.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Transportation.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Non-Energy Use.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Residential and Commercial.Mtoe"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

p <- ggplot(elMix, aes(period, value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_area() +
  facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))   # key for compact legend

g <- ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.25,
      font = list(size = 10),
      itemwidth = 30
    ),
    margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 20, b = 110)
  )

# 🔧 Fix domains WITHOUT breaking grid + add spacing
xaxes <- grep("^xaxis", names(g$x$layout), value = TRUE)

gap_inner <- 0.01   # spacing between panels
gap_outer <- 0.003  # spacing at edges (left/right)

for(i in seq_along(xaxes)) {
  col <- (i - 1) %% ncol
  
  start <- col / ncol
  end   <- (col + 1) / ncol
  
  left_gap  <- if(col == 0) gap_outer else gap_inner
  right_gap <- if(col == ncol - 1) gap_outer else gap_inner
  
  g$x$layout[[xaxes[i]]]$domain <- c(start + left_gap, end - right_gap)
}

g
```
---

# Final Energy Fuel {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Final Energy Fuel plot}
vars <- c(
  "Final Energy|Solids.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Fossil Liquids.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Gas.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Heat.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Renewables.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Electricity.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Hydrogen.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Other fuels.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Biofuels.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Nuclear.Mtoe"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

p <- ggplot(elMix, aes(period, value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_area() +
  facet_wrap(~region, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.05, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))   # key for compact legend

g <- ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.25,
      font = list(size = 10),
      itemwidth = 30
    ),
    margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 20, b = 110)
  )

# 🔧 Fix domains WITHOUT breaking grid + add spacing
xaxes <- grep("^xaxis", names(g$x$layout), value = TRUE)

gap_inner <- 0.01   # spacing between panels
gap_outer <- 0.003  # spacing at edges (left/right)

for(i in seq_along(xaxes)) {
  col <- (i - 1) %% ncol
  
  start <- col / ncol
  end   <- (col + 1) / ncol
  
  left_gap  <- if(col == 0) gap_outer else gap_inner
  right_gap <- if(col == ncol - 1) gap_outer else gap_inner
  
  g$x$layout[[xaxes[i]]]$domain <- c(start + left_gap, end - right_gap)
}

g
```
